artifacts.summary: Official discovery found one GCUF-controlled rules PDF with explicit AI-related competition rules for ISC Expo 2026. The evidence is event- and competition-scoped only. No broader university-wide generative-AI student policy was verified from official GCUF pages in this crawl.

stopConditions: Stop after the official GCUF-hosted rules PDF supports narrow event-scoped claim candidates.
Do not infer university-wide GCUF academic policy from event competition rules.
Reject research profiles, course listings, and news items that mention AI but do not provide policy rules.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 6th International Students' Convention & Expo 2026 Rules and Regulations
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Original Work: The essay must be the entirely original work of the participant. Plagiarism Policy: Copying from books, articles, websites, previously written material, or AIgenerated content is strictly prohibited. Zero Tolerance: Any form of plagiarism or misrepresentation of another person's ideas as one's own will result in instant disqualification.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Essay-writing rules prohibit copying from AI-generated content and state that plagiarism or misrepresentation results in instant disqualification.

artifacts.notes: Approved as an event-scoped candidate only. The source does not support a university-wide GCUF academic-integrity AI policy claim.
Approved as a narrow competition-rule candidate; evidence is specific to the ISC Expo rules PDF.
Approved as an event challenge-specific AI-tool treatment claim. It does not imply general student permission to use AI tools outside this competition.

artifacts.title: Government College University Faisalabad staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: The staged evidence for Government College University Faisalabad is limited to an official GCUF-hosted ISC Expo 2026 rules PDF. The PDF supports narrow event competition claims: some competitions prohibit AI-generated content, while the Mini AI Model Training and Deployment Challenge allows AI assistants such as ChatGPT and GitHub Copilot with limits on copying complete external solutions. No broader official GCUF university-wide generative-AI policy was verified in this crawl.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The verified AI-tool evidence is scoped to ISC Expo 2026 competition rules and should not be promoted as a general university-wide GCUF AI policy without additional official sources.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
